expectations.text: Recognises this is a Node/Express project and picks a JS-native runner (the fixture already has vitest/supertest in devDeps — should be used)
Keeps the suite small and explicitly fast — caps total runtime around 2 minutes or fewer than ~10 checks
expectations.evidence: 7 checks — at the upper bound but acceptable; also added a bash smoke script (bonus, slight scope creep)

expectations.text: Checks include at least one auth-or-error path, not only happy 200s, so a broken deploy actually surfaces
